01-welcome-home.note: Some drum-tab sources list a half-time reading of 77 bpm; 154 matches the song's driving quarter-note feel

03-a-little-less-conversation.note: JXL remix tempo (~115 bpm); 1968 Elvis original is close at ~114 bpm

07-tribute.note: tempo varies by section (intro/outro differ); 94 is the main groove

08-while-my-guitar-gently-weeps.note: sources range 115-123 depending on version/remaster; 116 reflects the White Album original

10-zombie.note: algorithmic analyzers report double-time ~167 bpm; guitar tab sites use 83-84 bpm as the practice tempo for the strummed riff

11-hunger-strike.note: analyzers report double-time ~138 bpm; the song's slow, spacious feel and tab annotations (~70 bpm) point to a half-time quarter-note pulse

17-the-pretender.note: Intro plays a half-time feel (~86 bpm) before the main groove locks into 172.

19-purple-rain.note: Quarter-note pulse; many chord sites list the half-time ~58 bpm strum feel.

22-dream-on.note: Main verse/chorus pulse; the song famously accelerates into the outro solo.

24-mary-jane-s-last-dance.note: Analyzers report ~170 double-time; 88 matches the published transcription.

25-valerie.note: Zutons original (the band's key); the Winehouse/Ronson cover is ~106.

26-voodoo-child-slight-return.note: SRV live tempi vary widely (~86+); 89 matches the Hendrix studio original and slower SRV takes.
